title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing a lightweight, extensible framework for running large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client library for Ollama, enabling easy integration of local LLMs into Node and browser apps.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama with async support and full API coverage for running and managing local LLMs.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, allowing use of local Ollama models within LangChain chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with chat interface, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing idiomatic JVM access to local LLMs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate offering async bindings to the Ollama REST API with strong typing and Tokio support.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI for Ollama with interactive model selection, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that integrates Ollama models for code completion, refactoring, and inline chat.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated list of GGUF models tested and optimized for use with Ollama.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Self-hosted Telegram bot that forwards messages to a local Ollama instance and streams replies.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration enabling Ollama models as generators and embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library for Ollama with strongly-typed API client and dependency-injection support for ASP.NET Core.

title: ollama-dify
summary: Dify integration that lets you plug Ollama models into Dify’s LLM orchestration and RAG workflows.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repository tracking community SDKs and integrations for languages not officially supported yet.

title: ollama-gpu-stack
summary: Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama with GPU monitoring, Prometheus metrics, and Grafana dashboards.
